---
title: "ChatBot on NorthEast Tourism"
subtitle: "A chatbot prototype for tourism-related information in NorthEast India"
author: ""
date: "2018-04-01"
citation: false
comments: false
toc: true
categories: [Chatbot, NLP, Tourism, Data Science, Hackathon]
image: featured.jpg
---

This project developed a chatbot for providing tourism-related information about NorthEast India. The chatbot was created during a Data Science Hackathon organized at IIT Guwahati.

The goal was to make tourism information more accessible through an interactive conversational interface.

## YouTube Video

The video below demonstrates the chatbot developed for North-East tourism information services.

<div style="text-align:center;">
<iframe
    width="800"
    height="450"
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/68_gVZ6CIRI"
    title="NorthEast Tourism Chatbot Demo"
    frameborder="0"
    allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

## Key Features

- Tourism information support for NorthEast India
- Chatbot-based user interaction
- Prototype developed during a hackathon
- Telegram bot interface

## Link

Telegram bot: [Sangrakt Bot](http://t.me/sangrakt_bot)

## Tools and Technologies

- Chatbot Development
- Basic NLP
- Telegram Bot
- Data Science Prototype
